new_classes.label_en: Distillation process from fermented fruit mash (all fruit)
new_classes.definition_en: A spirituous distillation process in which the distillate is obtained exclusively by distilling fermented fruit mash, including plums, pears, cherries, apples and other fruits.

A quality borne by a spirituous beverage that has been obtained exclusively by distilling fermented fruit mash (any fruit, including apple/calvados, plum, pear, cherry), discriminating it from spirits derived from grain, grape wine, grape marc, sugar cane, juniper berries or other non-fruit sources.

new_classes.label_en: Fruit spirit (distilled from fruit, incl. calvados), in containers holding ≤ 2 l (CN 2208 90 71)
new_classes.label_de: Obstbranntwein (aus Obst destilliert, einschl. Calvados), in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von ≤ 2 l (KN 2208 90 71)
new_classes.definition_en: A spirituous beverage under CN heading 2208, obtained exclusively by distillation of fermented fruit mash (including calvados distilled from fermented apple mash), presented in containers holding 2 litres or less, and not being a plum, pear or cherry spirit falling under CN 2208 90 33.

coverage_explanation: The legal text states that CN 2208 90 71 covers spirits distilled from fruit (Obstbranntwein), including calvados, and cross-references the explanatory note to subheading 2208 90 48 (other fruit spirits, excl. plum/pear/cherry, in containers > 2 l). The key discriminating criteria are: (1) distilled from fermented fruit mash, (2) presented in containers ≤ 2 l, (3) excludes plum, pear, cherry spirits (those fall under 2208 90 33). All three criteria are captured via: the FruitDistillationProcess restriction, the SmallContainer part restriction, and the complement on PlumPearCherryFruitSpiritQuality. Coverage is slightly below 1.0 because the cross-reference to the 22089048 explanatory note may contain further sub-criteria (e.g. the note specifying that the spirit must bear organoleptic characteristics from the fruit used) that are not yet fully formalised as named qualities in the TBox. The FruitSpiritQuality class captures this in intent but the note's precise wording for 22089048 is not directly available here.
